case_title: CURTIS THACKER, TRUSTEE OF THE SUSIE THACKER VS. TANYA PHILLIPS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURTIS THACKER, TRUSTEE OF THE SUSIE THACKER TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, TANYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1931 GOLDEN GATE AVE.( SOUTHWEST THRID FLOOR BEDROOM ) SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94115, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, TANYA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURTIS THACKER, TRUSTEE OF THE SUSIE THACKER TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, TANYA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY NAVIS, GLEN M.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURTIS THACKER, TRUSTEE OF THE SUSIE THACKER TRUST SERVED DEC-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, TANYA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, TANYA DOES 1 TO 5
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, TANYA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CURTIS THACKER, TRUSTEE OF THE SUSIE THACKER TRUST SERVED DEC-27-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
